ocr_text:
of the society. The Haat will lead these aristocrat people to the
huts and there would be a connection between all the classes. I
want to generate a fresh energy in the society. It is a sacred act
for me and a genuine help to those who want to earn their living.
It is neither a favour nor an encouragement. It is recognition of
the work that they have done. I wish to spread this message in
all the Temples and Derasars from where it would reach most
people. I urge them to start visiting these Haats so that they are
not restricted to specific areas like Ellisbridge, Vasna or
Karnavati but spread across Gujarat.
o
From the Market to the Heart
